info.name: text-delete
info.text:
When life calls, you need to step up to the plate. 
Life will not bail you out with a get out of jail free card. 
Life doesn't play by your rules.
We are all just pawns in Life.
Life does  not come with instructions. 
Life will sink your battleship without remorse.

info.text: In life, you have to know when to hold em, and know when to fold em.

info.text: Don't show your hand too early in life.
